metadata.name: Host a Q&A on Social Media

description: Following a major investigation, the lead reporter hosts a live Q&A session on Twitter to answer audience questions.

nodes.task_description: Announce the Q&A session in advance to gather questions from the audience.

expected_outcome.value: A pool of questions is ready before the event starts.

nodes.task_description: During the live session, monitor incoming questions and select the most relevant ones to answer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent effectively filters and prioritizes questions.

nodes.task_description: Provide clear and concise answers to the selected questions.

expected_outcome.value: The audience's questions are answered satisfactorily.
